title: Generate JSON Data for a Blog Post
scenario: Develop a prompt that generates JSON data for a blog post that includes articles with titles, summaries, and tags. The JSON output should be under 500 characters and include at least 3 articles with their respective titles, summaries, and tags.
constraints: Use a consistent naming convention for articles and tags

evaluationCriteria.description: Check if the generated JSON meets the character limit and uses a consistent naming convention.
Verify the accuracy and validity of the generated article data, including titles, summaries, and tags.
Check if the generated JSON includes at least 3 articles with their respective titles, summaries, and tags.
Evaluate the readability of the generated JSON, ensuring it is well-formatted and easy to understand.
